title: Story to Audio Converter
status_no_mse: Browser does not support live streaming. Generating audio, will play when done...
status_processing_live: Generating audio chunk {p}/{t} and streaming live...
status_done_loading: Audio generated, loading final part for playback...
status_stream_error: Cannot stream live. Waiting for audio to complete.
status_stream_done_loading: Audio generated, but player is still loading the final part...
sample_text: Once upon a time, in a small village, there lived a very clever boy. He always helped the people around him and was loved by everyone in the village. One day, a mysterious stranger arrived and posed a difficult riddle. The boy thought long and hard, and finally gave the correct answer. The villagers were amazed and proud of him.
